info.description: REST API for concerts, festivals, artists, and venues featuring normalized data from JamBase.
info.title: JamBase Concert Data API
info.summary: REST API for live music data from JamBase

pageParam.name: page
pageParam.description: Page number of results to retrieve

perPageParam.name: perPage
perPageParam.description: Number of events per page of results

eventTypeParam.name: eventType
eventTypeParam.description:
Used to isolate only concerts or only festivals(s)\
Leave blank to include both concerts and festivals
- eventType=concert
- eventType=festival

eventIdParam.name: eventId
eventIdParam.description:
Restrict the result set to a specific list of Event IDs.\
\
For example to fetch a single event:
- eventId=jambase:16013248

Use a pipe (|) to include multiple event IDs (recommended form, consistent with `artistId` and `venueId`):
- eventId=jambase:16013248|jambase:14331594

A URL-encoded JSON array of IDs is also accepted for compatibility with the v1 `eventId` parameter:
- eventId=%5B%22jambase%3A16013248%22%2C%22jambase%3A14331594%22%5D

To use non-JamBase data sources, use the EventDataSource [[enum](#)] for the ID(s) you are using.

eventNameParam.name: name
eventNameParam.description:
A keyword-based search across event titles (e.g. festival names, special-billing show titles). Resolved server-side against the JamBase title-search index; combined as AND with any other filters (`artistId`, `geoCityId`, dates, etc.). Returns an empty list when nothing matches. Search-tier failures are treated as no matches, never as a 5xx.
- name=Bonnaroo
- name=Phish%20New%20Year

artistIdParam.name: artistId
artistIdParam.description:
The source and unique identifier for the artist(s).\
\
For example to search for LCD Soundsystem events:

- artistId=jambase:228924

Use a pipe (|) to include multiple artist IDs.\
\
For example to search for LCD Soundsystem & Khalid events:
- artistId=jambase:228924|jambase:3074545

To use non-JamBase data sources, use the ArtistDataSource [[enum](#)] for the ID(s) you are using.\
\
For example to search for LCD Soundsystem events using their Ticketmaster ID:
  - artistId=ticketmaster:K8vZ9175st0

artistNameParam.name: artistName
artistNameParam.description:
A keyword-based search for artist name(s).
- artistName=Billie%20Eilish

Use a pipe (|) to include multiple artist names.
- artistName=Billie%20Eilish|Lucy%20Dacus

Keywords should be URL Encoded.\
For more precise artist-specific results try using `artistId` or `artist[slug]`.

Please note that `artistName` cannot be used togehter with `artistId` type searches and will be ignored if `artistId` is provided.

genreSlugParam.name: genreSlug
genreSlugParam.description:
Restrict results to a genre.
- genreSlug=bluegrass

Use a pipe (|) to include results from multiple genres.
- genreSlug=bluegrass|blues

venueIdParam.name: venueId
venueIdParam.description: The source and unique identifier for the venue(s) - venueId=jambase:62108 Use a pipe (|) to include multiple venue IDs - venueId=jambase:62108|jambase:7932731 To use non-JamBase IDs, use the source slug for the ID(s) you are using - venueId=ticketmaster:k7vGF99ORYpnS

venueNameParam.name: venueName
venueNameParam.description:
A keyword-based search for venue name(s).
- venueName=Brooklyn%20Bowl

Use a pipe (|) to include multiple venue IDs.
- venueName=Brooklyn%20Bowl|House%20of%20Blues

For more precise venue-specific results try using `venueId` or `venue[slug]`.

geoLatitudeParam.name: geoLatitude
geoLatitudeParam.description:
The latitude for geographic radius.
- geoLatitude=40.7505

geoLongitudeParam.name: geoLongitude
geoLongitudeParam.description:
The longitude for geographic radius.
- geoLongitude=-73.9934

geoStateIsoParam.name: geoStateIso
geoStateIsoParam.description:
The State code in ISO_3166-2 format [[docs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-2)].
- geoStateIso=US-NY

Use a pipe (|) to include multiple State codes.
- geoStateIso=US-NY|=US-PA

Note: Available for United States, Canada, and Australia only.

geoMetroIdParam.name: geoMetroId
geoMetroIdParam.description: Use to retrieve events for specific metro ID(s). - geoMetroId=jambase:1 Use a pipe (|) to include multiple metro IDs. - geoMetroId=jambase:1|jambase:5

geoCityNameParam.name: geoCityName
geoCityNameParam.description:
Use to retrieve events for city name(s).
- geoCityName=Seattle

Use a pipe (|) to include multiple city names.
- geoCityName=Seattle|Tacoma

For more precise city-specific results try using `city[id]`

geoCityIdParam.name: geoCityId
geoCityIdParam.description: Use to retrieve events for specific JamBase city ID(s) . - geoCityId=jambase:4223296 Use a pipe (|) to include multiple city IDs. - geoCityId=jambase:4223296|jambase:4224564 When using the `geoCityId` parameter, you can omit the the `geoRadiusAmount` parameter (or) set it to `0` (or) leave it empty to include only results from the city. Else, you can use a radius amount to include events within a radius around the city-center.

geoIpParam.name: geoIp
geoIpParam.description:
Use to retrieve events near an IP address.\
Supports IPv4 or IPv6 values.
- geoIp=55.123.456.789

geoRadiusAmountParam.name: geoRadiusAmount
geoRadiusAmountParam.description:
The search radius for lat/lng type searches.
- geoRadiusAmount=60

geoRadiusUnitsParam.name: geoRadiusUnits
geoRadiusUnitsParam.description:
Whether to use miles (default) or kilometers for radius.
- geoRadiusUnits=km

geoCountryIso2Param.name: geoCountryIso2
geoCountryIso2Param.description:
The two-letter ISO code for a country.
- geoCountryIso2=US

Use a pipe (|) to include multiple countries.
- geoCountryIso2=US|CA

geoCountryIso3Param.name: geoCountryIso3
geoCountryIso3Param.description:
The three-letter ISO code for a country.
- geoCountryIso3=USA

Use a pipe (|) to include multiple countries.
- geoCountryIso3=USA|CAN

datePresetParam.name: eventDatePreset
datePresetParam.description:
Use a dynamic date preset.
- eventDatePreset=tomorrow

Notes: 
- The `eventDatePreset` will override `eventDateFrom` & `eventDateTo` if those are set as well.
- The `halloween` preset returns events on 10/31 only. The `newYears` preset returns events on 12/31 only. The `july4th` preset returns events on or near July 4th.

dateFromParam.name: eventDateFrom
dateFromParam.description: For `concerts` must start on or after this date.\ For `festivals`, must start on or after this date.\ If left blank or omitted, will use the current date.\ The `expandPastEvents` parameter is required when using `eventDateFrom` before the current date. - eventDateFrom=2023-10-31 Note: Dates use RFC3339 format.

dateToParam.name: eventDateTo
dateToParam.description: For `concerts` must start on or before this date.\ For `festivals` must end on or before this date.\ If left blank or omitted, will return all events after `eventDateFrom`. - eventDateTo=2023-12-31 Note: Dates use RFC3339 format.

dateModifiedFromParam.name: dateModifiedFrom
dateModifiedFromParam.description: Must have been updated on or after this dateTime in GMT.\ If left blank or omitted, will use all updated on dates - dateModifiedFrom=2022-10-31 00:00:00 Note: Use RFC3339 format for parameter values.

datePublishedFromParam.name: datePublishedFrom
datePublishedFromParam.description: Must have been first published on or after this dateTime in GMT.\ \ If left blank or omitted, will use all first published on dates. - datePublishedFrom=2022-01-01 00:00:00 Note: Use RFC3339 format for parameter values.

streamDataSourceParam.name: streamDataSource
streamDataSourceParam.description:
Filter streams to those sourced from a specific stream platform.

v3 currently exposes a single source slug — `jambase` — which represents JamBase's normalized stream catalog. Pipe-delimited values are supported for forward compatibility:

- streamDataSource=jambase

excludeEventPerformersParam.name: excludeEventPerformers
excludeEventPerformersParam.description: Use `true` to suppress the `performer` node in `Concert` and `Festival` objects.

expandPastEventsParam.name: expandPastEvents
expandPastEventsParam.description:
Use `true` to include past/historical `Concert` and `Festival` objects.
\
When searching events, must be combined with `artistId` or `venueId` parameter.
\
Note: The `expandPastEvents` parameter requires that your apikey has the `expandPastEvents` enhancement turned on. Please contact JamBase to request access to this feature.

sortEventsParam.name: sort
sortEventsParam.description:
Sort order for the returned events.
\
- `eventDate` — ascending by event date (oldest first). This is the default.
\
- `-eventDate` — descending by event date (most recent first).
\
The leading `-` indicates descending order, following the [JSON:API](https://jsonapi.org/format/#fetching-sorting) convention.
\
Most useful when combined with `expandPastEvents=true` to retrieve an artist's or venue's most recent shows first without paginating through their full history.

expandExternalIdentifiersParam.name: expandExternalIdentifiers
expandExternalIdentifiersParam.description:
Use `true` to include external IDs for `Concert`, `Artist`, and `Venue` objects.
\
Note: The `expandExternalIdentifiers` parameter requires that your apikey has the `expandExternalIdentifiers` enhancement turned on. Please contact JamBase to request access to this feature.

expandArtistSameAsParam.name: expandArtistSameAs
expandArtistSameAsParam.description: Use `true` to include `sameAs` (i.e. links) for `Artist` responses.

enumArtistDataSource.description: Data source slugs to use for Artist IDs

enumVenueDataSource.description: Data source slugs to use for Venue IDs

enumEventDataSource.description: Data source slugs to use for Event IDs

enumStreamDataSource.description: Data source slugs to use for Stream IDs

enumEventType.description: The type of event being requested

enumEventStatus.description: The scheduling status for the event

enumRadiusUnits.description: The units of measure for a geo search radius

enumDatePresets.description: Presets for frequently used date ranges.

enumUrlType.description: The type of the external URL

enumAttendanceMode.description: Indicates whether it occurs online, offline, or a mix.

enumFestivalLineupDisplayOption.description: Whether to display the `full` lineup or a `daybyday` breakdown

enumState.description: A State code in ISO 3166-2 format [[docs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-2)].

enumCountryIso2.description: The Country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format [[docs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2)].

enumCountryIso3.description: The Country code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 format [[docs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-3)].

AdministrativeArea.title: AdministrativeArea
AdministrativeArea.description: A Metro Area comprised of multiple cities.

identifier.description: The unique JamBase identifier for the Metro Area.

name.description: The name of the Metro Area

geo.description: The lat/lng for the centroid of the Metro Area

addressRegion.description: The primary State/Region for Metro Area.

x-primaryCityId.description: The unique identifier for the primary City for Metro Area.

x-numUpcomingEvents.description: The number of upcoming events across all Cities in this Metro.

identifier.description: The unique identifier for the City/Locality.

geo.description: The lat/lng for the centroid of the City/Locality.

addressCountry.description: The two-letter ISO code for the Country.

containedInPlace.description: When using the `/cities` endpoint, this will include the Metro Area if the city is part of one.

x-numUpcomingEvents.description: The number of upcoming events in this City.

x-subtitle.description: To supplement the title to help describe the event (e.g. Album Release Party)

x-headlinerInSupport.description: if headlining performers should be listed with support acts (typically used with `x-customTitle`)

x-streamIds.description: An array of one or more IDs for Streams associated with a Concert

name.description: The name of the Country Area

x-numUpcomingEvents.description:
The number of upcoming events in this Country.
\
Note: this is only provided in the Geography lookup endpoints, not as part of a location within a Concert, Festival, or Stream.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: A generic event.Please note that `startDate`,`endDate`,`previousStartDate`, and `doorTime` are all returned based on the venue's local time but without an offset. You can find the timezone at `event > location > address > x-timezone` if you need to do any conversions.

sameAs.description: Only available for `Festival` type events, not `Concert`

startDate.description:
The start date and time of the item using ISO 8601 date format [[docs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)]
\
Please note that `startDate` is returned based on the venue's local time but without an offset. You can find the timezone at `event > location > address > x-timezone` if you need to do any conversions.

endDate.description:
The end date of the item using ISO 8601 date format [[docs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)]
\
Please note that `endDate` is returned based on the venue's local time but without an offset. You can find the timezone at `event > location > address > x-timezone` if you need to do any conversions.

previousStartDate.description:
For rescheduled events, the previously scheduled start date using ISO 8601 date format [[docs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)]
\
Please note that `previousStartDate` is returned based on the venue's local time but without an offset. You can find the timezone at `event > location > address > x-timezone` if you need to do any conversions.

doorTime.description:
The time admission will commence in local time using ISO 8601 date format [[docs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)]
\
Please note that `doorTime` is returned based on the venue's local time but without an offset. You can find the timezone at `event > location > address > x-timezone` if you need to do any conversions.

x-performanceDate.description: The date of the performance using ISO 8601 date format [[docs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)]

x-performanceRank.description: The "rank" for this performance whithin the event

x-isHeadliner.description: If this performer is a headliner

x-dateIsConfirmed.description:
Required for Festivals.
If a Festival performance date is confirmed or not.\
If not, it will appear on the first day of the Festival.

x-promoImage.description: A secondary promotional image for the event (e.g. admat)

ExternalIdentifier.title: ExternalIdentifier
ExternalIdentifier.description: A third-party non-JamBase ID for an artist, venue, or event.

identifier.description: The unique identifier of the item from the third-party source.

name.description: The display name for the genre.

GeoCoordinates.title: GeoCoordinates
GeoCoordinates.description: The latitude and longitude for a place

member.description: For bands, an array of the band's members

identifier.description: A unique identifier of the item

memberOf.description: For musicians, an array of the band's the musician is a member of

identifier.description: A unique identifier of the item

foundingDate.description: The year the artist first performed

events.description: Only available when using `expandUpcomingEvents=true` and/or `expandUpcomingStreams=true` URL param.

x-numUpcomingEvents.description: The number of upcoming events for this artist.

MusicVenue.title: MusicVenue
MusicVenue.description: A place to Go See Live Music

maximumAttendeeCapacity.description: The total number of individuals that may attend an event or venue.

x-isPermanentlyClosed.description: If the venue is permanently closed.

x-numUpcomingEvents.description: The number of upcoming events at this venue.

Offer.title: Offer
Offer.description: Something for sale, typically a concert ticket

identifier.description: A unique identifier of the item

category.description: The category of the Offer, typically used to identify a primary or secondary ticketing link

Organization.title: Organization
Organization.description:
An organization or business.\
Typically a ticket vendor or data source in this API.\
The `identifier` or "slug" can also be used as `ticket[vendor][id]` in `/events` and `/livestreams` search endpoints.

identifier.description: A unique identifier of the item

perPage.description: Number of events per page of results.

nextPage.description: The absolute URL for the next page of results, if available (e.g. `https://api.data.jambase.com/v3/events?page=2`).

previousPage.description: The absolute URL for the previous page of results, if available (e.g. `https://api.data.jambase.com/v3/events?page=1`).

PriceSpecification.title: PriceSpecification
PriceSpecification.description: The price or price range for the thing

minPrice.description: The lowest price if the price is a range

maxPrice.description: The highest price if the price is a range

price.description: The singular price if not a range, same as `minPrice` if a range

priceCurrency.description: The currency of the price in ISO 4217 format [[docs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)]

PostalAddress.title: PostalAddress
PostalAddress.description: A postal address, typically for a MusicVenue

addressLocality.description: The city/locality in which the place is in

x-streetAddress2.description: An optional second line for street address.

x-jamBaseMetroId.description: A unique identifier to the JamBase metro.

x-jamBaseCityId.description: A unique identifier to the JamBase city.

ip.description: The requesting IP address, IPv4 or IPv6

State.title: State
State.description:
A State, Region, or Province.
\
Note 1: Available for United States, Canada, and Australia only.
\
Note 2: The `country` and `x-numUpcomingEvents` nodes are only provided in the Geography lookup endpoints, not as part of `addressRegion` within a Concert, Festival, or Stream.

alternateName.description: The indentifier without the Country code prefix

country.description:
The country in which the state belongs.
\
Note: this is only provided in the Geography lookup endpoints, not as part of a location's `addressCountry` within a Concert, Festival, or Stream.

x-numUpcomingEvents.description:
The number of upcoming events in this State.
\
Note: this is only provided in the Geography lookup endpoints, not as part of a location within a Concert, Festival, or Stream.

isLiveBroadcast.description: True if the broadcast is of a live event

identifier.description: A unique identifier of the item

image.description:
An image of the item.\
\
Please note that 'image' may not be provided for all Schemas that include `Thing` (e.g. `Organization`)

sameAs.description: URL of a reference Web page that unambiguously indicates the item's identity

datePublished.description:
The date the Event first appeared in ISO 8601 date format [[docs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)]
\
Please note that 'datePublished' may not be provided for all Schemas that include `Thing` (e.g. `Organization`)

dateModified.description:
The date the Event was last updated in ISO 8601 date format [[docs](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)]
\
Please note that 'dateModified' may not be provided for all Schemas that include `Thing` (e.g. `Organization`).
\
Indexing timestamps for Concert / Festival / Stream / MusicGroup / MusicVenue live on `datePublished` and `dateModified`. The sibling `x-createdOnDate` and `x-updatedOnDate` fields are scoped to data-source / `Organization` responses (e.g. ticket vendors, performance-rights organizations) and are not present on Event-derived schemas.

url.description: The URL of the external link.

propDeletionStatus.title: propDeletionStatus
propDeletionStatus.description:
Present ONLY on tombstone rows returned by delta polls of the core feeds (i.e. requests that include `dateModifiedFrom`). Marks a record that has left the catalog so a long-lived mirror can drop or redirect it:
- `deleted` — permanently removed.
- `trashed` — soft-deleted (events only; recoverable upstream). Treat the same as `deleted` in your cache.
- `merged` — folded into another record; follow `mergedInto`.
\
A tombstone row carries only `@type`, `identifier`, `deletionStatus`, `deletedAt`, `dateModified`, and (when `merged`) `mergedInto` — no other fields. Tombstones count toward `perPage` and `pagination.totalItems` and are appended after the live rows in the merged result sequence. Retention: `deleted` / `trashed` tombstones are emitted for 90 days after `deletedAt`; `merged` tombstones never expire. Queries WITHOUT `dateModifiedFrom` never return tombstones.

propDeletedAt.title: propDeletedAt
propDeletedAt.description: The moment the record left the catalog, in ISO 8601. Present only on tombstone rows (see `deletionStatus`). Equals the row's `dateModified` so the same `dateModifiedFrom` watermark that catches updates also catches the removal.

propMergedInto.title: propMergedInto
propMergedInto.description: On a `merged` tombstone (see `deletionStatus`), the `identifier` of the surviving record this one was folded into. Repoint cached references from `identifier` to `mergedInto`.

UnauthorizedError.description: API key is missing or invalid

get.description: Search events by location, date, artist, genre, and more.

parameters.name: eventDataSource
parameters.description: The EventDataSource of for the Event.

get.summary: Get / reverse-lookup an Event by JamBase or third-party ID
get.description: Retrieve a specific Event by JamBase or third-party ID

parameters.name: eventDataSource
parameters.description: The eventDataSource of the ID for the Event.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: The unique ID for the Event.

get.description:
Search upcoming streams by date, artist, genre, and more.
Past streams are not available via the API.

get.summary: Get / reverse-lookup a Stream by JamBase or third-party ID
get.description: Retrieve a specific stream by JamBase or third-party ID.

parameters.name: streamDataSource
parameters.description: The StreamDataSource of the ID for the Stream.

parameters.name: streamId
parameters.description: The unique ID for the Stream.

get.description:
Search artists by name and genre. 
<!-- theme: info -->
> #### Requirement
> Your request must include at least one of the `artistName` or `genreSlug` parameters.

parameters.name: artistHasUpcomingEvents
parameters.description: Set to true to only return artists that have at least one upcoming Concert or Festival

get.summary: Get / reverse-lookup an Artist by JamBase or third-party ID
get.description: Retrieve a specific artist by JamBase or third-party ID.

parameters.name: artistDataSource
parameters.description: the ArtistDataSource of the ID for the artist

parameters.name: artistId
parameters.description: the unique ID for the artist

parameters.name: expandUpcomingEvents
parameters.description: Use `true` to include the `event` node with any upcoming events for the artist.

parameters.name: expandUpcomingStreams
parameters.description: Use `true` to include the `event` node with any upcoming Streams for the venue.

get.description:
Search venues by location and more.

<!-- theme: info  -->
> #### Requirement
>
> Your request must include at the `venueName` or at least one of the geo parameters such as `geoCityId`, `geoCountryIso2`, `geoCountryIso3`, `geoIp`, `geoMetroId`, `geoStateIso`, or , `geoLatitude` and `geoLongitude`.

parameters.name: venueHasUpcomingEvents
parameters.description: Set to true to only return venues that have at least one upcoming event

get.summary: Get / reverse-lookup a Venue by JamBase or third-party ID
get.description: Retrieve a specific venue by JamBase or third-party ID.

parameters.name: venueDataSource
parameters.description: the VenueDataSource of the ID for the artist

parameters.name: venueId
parameters.description: the unique ID for the Venue

parameters.name: expandUpcomingEvents
parameters.description: Use `true` to include the `event` node with any upcoming Concerts and Festivals for the venue.

get.description:
Search for cities. Results will be returned in order of most to least upcoming events in the city, and then alphabetically city name in the case of a tie.       

<!-- theme: info  -->
> #### Requirement
> Your request must include at least one of the geo parameters such as `geoCityName`, `geoCountryIso2`, `geoCountryIso3`, `geoIp`, `geoMetroId`, `geoStateIso`, or `geoLatitude` and `geoLongitude`.

parameters.name: cityHasUpcomingEvents
parameters.description: Only include Cities with / without upcoming events. Omit for both.

get.description:
A Metro is a collection of Cities, such as the Los Angeles area which includes LA, Hollywood, Anaheim, and more that can be used to filter Events.\
\
Returns all Metros in Alphabetical order by identifier.

schema.description: An array of `Metro` objects with member `City` objects

parameters.name: metroHasUpcomingEvents
parameters.description: Only include Metros with / without upcoming events. Omit for both.

parameters.name: cityHasUpcomingEvents
parameters.description: Only include Cities with / without upcoming events. Omit for both.

parameters.name: expandMetroCities
parameters.description: Use `true` to include the `containsPlace` node with the cities for each metro.

get.description:
A States (or Region / Province) is a collection of Cities, such as California (USA) or Quebec (Canada) that can be used to filter Events.\
\
Returns all States/Regions in Alphabetical order by identifier.
\
Note: Available for United States, Canada, and Australia only.

parameters.name: stateHasUpcomingEvents
parameters.description: Only include States with / without upcoming events. Omit for both.

get.description: Returns all Countries in alphabetical order by ISO2.

parameters.name: countryHasUpcomingEvents
parameters.description: Only include Countries with / without upcoming events. Omit for both.

get.description:
These can be used to filter events by Event IDs from third-party Data Sources.\
\
Returns all Event Data Sources in Alphabetical order.

200.description: A list of Event Data Sources

schema.description:
An array of `DataSource` objects representing Event Data Sources\
\
Results are sorted alphabed

get.description:
These can be used to filter Streams from a specific Streaming platform.\
\
Returns all Stream Data Sources in Alphabetical order.

200.description: A list of Stream Ticket Vendors

schema.description:
An array of `Organization` objects representing Stream Ticket Vendors\
\
Results are sorted alphabetically by identifier

get.description:
These can be used to filter events by Artist IDs from third-party Data Sources.\
\
Returns all Artist Data Sources in Alphabetical order.

200.description: A list of Artist Data Sources

schema.description:
An array of `DataSource` objects representing Artist Data Sources\
\
Results are sorted alphabed

get.description:
These can be used to filter events by Venue IDs from third-party Data Sources.\
\
This endpoint returns all Venue Data Sources in Alphabetical order.

200.description: A list of Venue Data Sources

schema.description:
An array of `DataSource` objects representing Venue Data Sources\
\
Results are sorted alphabed

get.description:
These can be used to filter Artists and Events.\
\
Returns all Genres in Alphabetical order.

schema.description:
An array of Genres
\
Results are sorted alphabetically by name
